title: Raccoon Removal in College Point, Queens | $900 – $4,000

intro: College Point residents facing raccoon problems need swift, professional intervention to protect their homes and families. Our expert raccoon removal services address infestations in attics, crawl spaces, and around properties throughout this waterfront Queens neighborhood. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane, effective raccoon extraction and exclusion services tailored to College Point's unique residential landscape.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving College Point's diverse housing stock, from single-family homes near the waterfront to multi-family buildings along College Point Boulevard. Our licensed technicians use humane removal methods, comprehensive exclusion techniques, and offer same-day emergency service to quickly resolve your raccoon issues.
localContext: College Point's proximity to the East River and Flushing Bay, along with mature trees near MacNeil Park and Poppenhusen Park, creates ideal habitat for raccoons seeking food and shelter. The neighborhood's mix of older single-family homes and newer developments provides numerous entry points that raccoons exploit, making professional exclusion services essential for long-term protection.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in College Point?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in College Point typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring repair, and accessibility of nesting areas. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What are signs of raccoons in my College Point home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include loud thumping or scratching sounds at night in attics or walls, torn shingles or damaged soffits, scattered garbage, strong odors, visible paw prints, and droppings. Raccoons are nocturnal and most active between dusk and dawn, so nighttime noises are a key indicator.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal in College Point humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, ethical removal methods compliant with New York wildlife regulations. We employ live trapping and one-way exclusion doors that allow raccoons to exit but not re-enter, then relocate them according to state guidelines and seal all entry points to prevent returns.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my College Point property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in College Point for urgent situations. Most raccoon removal projects are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the complexity. Initial trapping and removal typically happens within 24-48 hours, followed by exclusion work and cleanup to ensure raccoons cannot return.
